resumeLength: One page for most legal internships and entry roles; longer CV only for academic/legal scholarship profiles.

formattingRules.bulletStyle: Concise bullets that foreground research, drafting, jurisdiction, and audience.

writingRules.bulletFormula: Action + legal material + analytical method + audience/use + quality, decision, or compliance value
quantificationRules: Prefer concrete scope: sample size, stakeholder count, case volume, event size, model accuracy, project duration, budget, risk, or response time when supported by source facts.
When exact numbers are absent, use bounded evidence such as tool, method, deliverable, audience, or process scope; never invent metrics.
Use metrics differently by domain: technical performance for engineering, compliance/accuracy for audit, writing/research output for law and policy, service reliability for hospitality.

exampleBullets.weak: Did legal research for the team.
exampleBullets.strong: Researched case law and statutory guidance to draft a legal memo summarizing risk considerations for attorney review.
exampleBullets.reason: Shows material, method, deliverable, and audience while preserving legal responsibility boundaries.

exampleBullets.strong: Reviewed contract clauses against internal compliance checklist and summarized exceptions for follow-up discussion.
exampleBullets.reason: Uses precise compliance language instead of vague support phrasing.

scoringCriteria.description: Conventional headings, readable layout, aligned dates, consistent spacing, and parser-friendly text.
Prominent sections and bullets match the target role and market context.
Bullets show action, method, scope, and outcome without unsupported claims.
Specific, concise, role-native language with no inflated AI phrasing.
Structure and density match the selected role, country, and CV/resume style.

promptSnippets.title: Law and Legal Resume routing rule
promptSnippets.content: When the target role matches Law / Legal / Compliance, use Law and Legal Resume as the primary industry route and adopt this formula: Action + legal material + analytical method + audience/use + quality, decision, or compliance value.

promptSnippets.title: Law and Legal Resume language guardrail
promptSnippets.content: Preserve domain-native evidence for Law / Legal / Compliance; do not convert the profile into a generic tech, finance, or consulting resume unless the user target explicitly requires it.

sourceReferences.label: Local 123456 CV sample corpus
sourceReferences.note: 56 newly added CV/resume samples from docs/sample-resume-knowledge; abstracted into rules only, without copying resume text.

sourceReferences.label: Existing local resume-learning corpus
sourceReferences.note: Previously extracted school resume guides, templates, sample resumes, and industry profiles.

existing school guide and industry rule-set format
